about: Hi, I'm Kenneth, but you can call me keni.
I build apps, design interfaces, experiment with game development, and explore things like Math, ML, AI, and whatever tech topic steals my attention this week.
I’m currently finishing my software engineering degree, freelancing, and working on side projects that usually start as “small ideas” and somehow become full ecosystems.
I like minimalist applications, clean UI, music, art, and making things that feel good to use.
Simple on the outside. Slightly chaotic in the source code.
